name: delay_slot_fill
title: Move a store/load into a branch delay slot via fill_delay
summary: Pipeline emits a `nop` in the delay slot of a `jal`/`branch`; target uses that slot to hold a real instruction (typically a store). regfix's `fill_delay` operation moves the source instruction into the slot and deletes the nop.

structural: At the slot index there is a `nop` in pipeline output but a real op in target
The real op already exists earlier or later in pipeline output -- it just needs to move

rule_skeleton.comment: move src instruction into the jal/branch delay slot

notes: All delay slot fills in BB2 are GCC-scheduled, NOT ASPSX-scheduled (proven). regfix is the right layer.
If the source instruction has a side effect on a register read by the branch, do not move it -- the branch evaluates before the delay slot executes.
